videoSnippet.title: Shades of 2800 || Nikolas Theodorou vs Shakhriyar Mamedyarov || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Theodorou, Nikolas (2634) - Mamedyarov, Shakhriyar (2717)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.06.12
D20 Queen's Gambit Accepted, 3.e4

1.d4 d5 2.c4 dxc4 3.e4 b5 4.a4 c6 5.Nc3 b4 6.Na2 Nf6 7.Nf3 Nxe4 8.Bxc4 e6 9.O-O Be7 10.Re1 Nd6 11.Bb3 Nf5 12.g4 Nh4 13.Nxh4 Bxh4 14.Nxb4 O-O 15.Bf4 Bb7 16.Rc1 Qf6 17.Qd2 Rd8 18.d5 exd5 19.g5 Qf5 20.Re5 Qg4+ 21.Bg3 Nd7 22.Bd1 Qh3 23.Re7 Re8 24.Qe3 Rxe7 25.Qxe7 h6 26.Bxh4 Qxh4 27.Nxc6 Nf6 28.Qxb7 Qxg5+ 29.Kf1 Qxc1 30.Qxa8+ Kh7 31.Kg2 Qxd1 32.Qc8 Qc2 33.h3 d4 34.Nxa7 Qe4+ 35.Kg1 d3 36.Nb5 Qe1+ 37.Kg2 Qe4+ 38.Kg1 Nd5 39.Nc3 Qg6+ 40.Kf1 d2 41.Nd1 Qe4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:45 Game Starts!
02:15 CNG (Nf3)
09:00 Pause the video!
15:00 IWITP
16:47 Standings after Round 6
17:40 Legends Of The Channel
18:04 Lotus is the Way!
